scope: Tier-1 migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (surveys, collectors, survey_responses). SurveyMonkey's survey-editing, webhook, and contact-management endpoints are out of scope (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream; used only by base.check
legacy connector never implemented survey creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented survey updates; Pass B capability expansion
webhook management not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
contact management not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
